config.neo4j.topic.cypher.prod.ehr.graph.mutati: MERGE (p:Patient {patientId: event.patientId}) MERGE (e:Event {id: event.id, type: event.sourceEventType, timestamp: event.routingTime}) MERGE (p)-[:HAS_EVENT]->(e) SET e.priority = event.priority, e.payload = event.originalPayload
config.neo4j.topic.cypher.prod.ehr.events.enric: MERGE (p:Patient {patientId: event.patientId}) ON CREATE SET p.createdAt = datetime() MERGE (e:Event {id: event.id}) ON CREATE SET e.type = event.sourceEventType, e.timestamp = event.routingTime, e.payload = event.originalPayload MERGE (p)-[:HAS_EVENT]->(e)
